attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HEADERS_ALL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HEADERS_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HEADERS_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME, CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HEADERS_ALL.SAF_ID, CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HEADERS_ALL.DISPUTE_SOURCE, CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HEADERS_ALL.DISPUTE_PRIVATE, CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HEADERS_ALL.DISPUTE_REASON, CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HEADERS_ALL.DISPUTE_DATE, CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HEADERS_ALL.DISPUTE_STATUS, CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HEADERS_ALL.DISPUTE_TOTAL, CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HEADERS_ALL.DISPUTE_CAUSED_BY, CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HEADERS_ALL.USER_DEFAULT_ROLE_ID, CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HEADERS_ALL.USER_GROUP_ID, CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HEADERS_ALL.COLLECTOR_ID, 
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE (CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HEADERS_ALL.COMMENTS, '[^!-.*{},#&!/\/a-z|A-Z|0-9| ]', NULL),CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' '),
 CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HEADERS_ALL.ORG_ID, CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HEADERS_ALL.CREATED_BY, CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HEADERS_ALL.CREATION_DATE, CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HEADERS_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HEADERS_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HEADERS_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN 
FROM
 CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HEADERS_ALL 
WHERE
 SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HEADERS_ALL)
attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HEADERS_ALL)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HDRS_ALL.SAF_ID, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HDRS_ALL.DISPUTE_SOURCE, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HDRS_ALL.DISPUTE_PRIVATE, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HDRS_ALL.DISPUTE_REASON, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HDRS_ALL.DISPUTE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HDRS_ALL.DISPUTE_STATUS, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HDRS_ALL.DISPUTE_TOTAL, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HDRS_ALL.DISPUTE_CAUSED_BY, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HDRS_ALL.USER_DEFAULT_ROLE_ID, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HDRS_ALL.USER_GROUP_ID, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HDRS_ALL.COLLECTOR_ID, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HDRS_ALL.COMMENTS, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HDRS_ALL.ORG_ID, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HDRS_ALL.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HDRS_ALL.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HDRS_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HDRS_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HDRS_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HDRS_ALL.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HDRS_ALL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HDRS_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HDRS_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HDRS_ALL.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HDRS_ALL STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HDRS_ALL,
 (
 select SAF_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HDRS_ALL
 minus
 select SAF_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HEADERS_ALL
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.SAF_ID = STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HDRS_ALL.SAF_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_HDRS_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME
